languages.text: "Мне почудилось, что звал меня не господин Руолдо, а мой брат. Но ведь Дана там не было, а значит я просто от испуга нафантазировала".
"I thought it was my brother calling my name, not Lord Ruoldo. But Daen wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."
languages.original_text: "Мне почудилось, что звал меня не господин Руолдо, а мой брат. Но ведь Дана там не было, а значит я просто от испуга нафантазировала".

traits.locale_text: "I had a feeling it was my brother calling my name, not Mr Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."
"I had a feeling it was my brother calling my name, not Mr Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."
"It felt like it was my brother calling my name, not Master Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."
"It felt like it was my brother calling my name, not Master Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."
"I thought it was my brother calling my name, not Lord Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."
"I thought it was my brother calling my name, not Lord Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."

languages.text: 「私の名前を呼んだのは兄だと思ったんです。ルオルド様ではなく…でもダンはあそこにはいなかった…つまり、怯えたあまりに聞き間違えただけだったんです」
languages.original_text: "I thought it was my brother calling my name, not Lord Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."

traits.locale_text: 「私の名前を呼んだのは兄だと思ったんです。ルオルド様ではなく…でもダンはあそこにはいなかった…つまり、怯えたあまりに聞き間違えただけだったんです」

languages.text: "Adımı seslenen kişinin Lord Ruoldo değil, kardeşim olduğunu sandım. Fakat Dan orada değildi, korkudan hayal görmüş olmalıyım."
languages.original_text: "I thought it was my brother calling my name, not Lord Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."

traits.locale_text: "Adımı seslenen kişinin Lord Ruoldo değil, kardeşim olduğunu sandım. Fakat Dan orada değildi, korkudan hayal görmüş olmalıyım."

languages.text: «Que era mi hermano quien me llamaba, no lord Ruoldo. Pero Dan no estaba aquí, así que he debido de imaginármelo por el miedo».
languages.original_text: "I thought it was my brother calling my name, not Lord Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."

traits.locale_text: «Que era mi hermano quien me llamaba, no lord Ruoldo. Pero Dan no estaba aquí, así que he debido de imaginármelo por el miedo».

languages.text: “我还以为叫我的人并不是罗尔多大人，而是我的哥哥。不过，丹根本不在这里，应该是我吓坏了，听错了。”
languages.original_text: "I thought it was my brother calling my name, not Lord Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."

traits.locale_text: “我还以为叫我的人并不是罗尔多大人，而是我的哥哥。不过，丹根本不在这里，应该是我吓坏了，听错了。”

languages.text: « J'ai cru que c'était mon frère qui m'appelait, pas le seigneur Ruoldo. Mais Dan n'était pas là, ce n'était que le fruit de mon imagination. »
languages.original_text: "I thought it was my brother calling my name, not Lord Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai cru que c'était mon frère qui m'appelait, pas le seigneur Ruoldo. Mais Dan n'était pas là, ce n'était que le fruit de mon imagination. »

languages.text: "Ich dachte, mein Bruder hätte meinen Namen gerufen, nicht Lord Ruoldo. Aber Dan war nicht dort, also habe ich es mir in meiner Angst wohl nur eingebildet."
languages.original_text: "I thought it was my brother calling my name, not Lord Ruoldo. But Dan wasn't there, meaning I just imagined it in my fright."

traits.locale_text: "Ich dachte, mein Bruder hätte meinen Namen gerufen, nicht Lord Ruoldo. Aber Dan war nicht dort, also habe ich es mir in meiner Angst wohl nur eingebildet."
